content.text:
Audio Recorder is now fully open on the main recording interface. I can see:
- Title "Audio Recorder" at top
- Waveform display
- Timer showing "00:00"
- "Record-1" label
- Recording button (white circle) at the bottom center
- Settings gear icon and list icon

No more permission dialogs are showing — the app is ready to use. The microphone permission was already granted (no microphone permission dialog appeared, meaning it was pre-granted or granted with the notification).

result:
Audio Recorder is now fully open on the main recording interface. I can see:
- Title "Audio Recorder" at top
- Waveform display
- Timer showing "00:00"
- "Record-1" label
- Recording button (white circle) at the bottom center
- Settings gear icon and list icon

No more permission dialogs are showing — the app is ready to use. The microphone permission was already granted (no microphone permission dialog appeared, meaning it was pre-granted or granted with the notification).
